## File: `admin/templates/2fa_prompt.html`
```html
{{define "2fa_prompt.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Enable 2FA - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body class="auth-layout">
    <div class="auth-card">
        <header>
            <div class="icon-lg">&#x1F512;</div>
            <h1>Secure Your Account</h1>
            <p>Enable two-factor authentication</p>
        </header>

        <p>Add an extra layer of security. You'll need a code from your authenticator app each time you sign in.</p>

        <div class="actions-grid" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
            <a href="/admin/2fa/setup" class="btn-primary">Enable 2FA</a>
            <a href="/admin" class="btn-secondary">Skip for now</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/2fa_setup.html`
```html
{{define "2fa_setup.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>2FA Setup - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        {{if .TOTPEnabled}}
        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Two-Factor Authentication</h1>
            <p><span class="status success">Enabled</span></p>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <p>Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.</p>

            <details>
                <summary>Disable 2FA</summary>
                <p><small>Warning: This will make your account less secure.</small></p>
                <form method="POST" action="/admin/2fa/disable"
                      onsubmit="return confirm('Disable two-factor authentication?');">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                    <label>
                        Confirm Password
                        <input type="password" name="password" required>
                    </label>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn-danger" style="width: auto;">Disable 2FA</button>
                </form>
            </details>
        </div>

        {{else if eq .Step "backup"}}
        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Backup Codes</h1>
            <p>Save these codes in a secure location</p>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <p><strong>Important:</strong> These codes can be used if you lose access to your authenticator. Each code works only once.</p>

            <div class="backup-grid">
                {{range .BackupCodes}}
                <code>{{.}}</code>
                {{end}}
            </div>

            <div class="alert alert-error">
                You will not see these codes again!
            </div>

            <form method="POST" action="/admin/2fa/setup">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="confirm_backup">
                <label>
                    <input type="checkbox" id="confirm" name="confirmed" value="yes" required>
                    I have saved these backup codes
                </label>
                <button type="submit" id="btn" disabled>Enable 2FA</button>
            </form>

            <script>
                document.getElementById('confirm').onchange = function() {
                    document.getElementById('btn').disabled = !this.checked;
                };
            </script>
        </div>

        {{else if eq .Step "qr"}}
        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Enable 2FA</h1>
            <p>Scan the QR code with your authenticator app</p>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <ol>
                <li>Install an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password)</li>
                <li>Scan the QR code below</li>
                <li>Enter the 6-digit code to verify</li>
            </ol>

            <div class="qr-code">
                <img src="data:image/png;base64,{{.QRCode}}" alt="QR Code" width="180" height="180">
                <div class="secret">{{.Secret}}</div>
            </div>

            <form method="POST" action="/admin/2fa/setup">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="verify_totp">
                <label>
                    Verification Code
                    <input type="text" name="code" class="code" required
                           pattern="[0-9]{6}" maxlength="6" placeholder="000000"
                           autocomplete="one-time-code">
                </label>
                <button type="submit">Verify</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        {{else}}
        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Enable 2FA</h1>
            <p>Verify your password to continue</p>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <p>To enable two-factor authentication, please confirm your password first.</p>

            <form method="POST" action="/admin/2fa/setup">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="verify_password">
                <label>
                    Current Password
                    <input type="password" name="password" required autofocus>
                </label>
                <button type="submit">Continue</button>
            </form>
        </div>
        {{end}}

        <p style="margin-top: 1.5rem;"><a href="/admin">&larr; Back to Dashboard</a></p>
    </main>

    <script>
        var code = document.querySelector('.code');
        if (code) code.oninput = function() { this.value = this.value.replace(/\D/g, ''); };
    </script>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/2fa_verify.html`
```html
{{define "2fa_verify.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Verify - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body class="auth-layout">
    <div class="auth-card">
        <header>
            <h1>Two-Factor Authentication</h1>
            <p>Enter your verification code</p>
        </header>

        {{if .Error}}
        <div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>
        {{end}}

        <form method="POST" action="/admin/login/2fa">
            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
            <label>
                Code
                <input type="text" name="code" class="code" required
                       autocomplete="one-time-code" autofocus
                       placeholder="000000" maxlength="9">
            </label>
            <small>Or use a backup code (xxxx-xxxx)</small>
            <button type="submit">Verify</button>
        </form>

        <footer>
            <a href="/admin/login">&larr; Back to login</a>
        </footer>
    </div>

    <script>
        document.querySelector('.code').addEventListener('input', function() {
            if (/^\d{6}$/.test(this.value) || /^[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}$/i.test(this.value)) {
                this.form.submit();
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/_head.html`
```html
{{define "head"}}
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/admin/static/pico.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/admin/static/styles.css">
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/_navbar.html`
```html
{{define "navbar"}}
<nav class="navbar">
    <div>
        <a href="/admin" class="brand">Maps Scraper</a>
    </div>
    <ul>
        <li><a href="/riverui/">Queue</a></li>
        <li><a href="/swagger/index.html">API Docs</a></li>
        <li><a href="/admin/jobs">Jobs</a></li>
        <li><a href="/admin/workers">Workers</a></li>
        <li><a href="/admin/api-keys">API Keys</a></li>
        <li><a href="/admin/settings">Settings</a></li>
        <li>
            <form method="POST" action="/admin/logout" style="display: inline;">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                <button type="submit" class="btn-link">Logout</button>
            </form>
        </li>
    </ul>
</nav>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/api_keys.html`
```html
{{define "api_keys.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>API Keys - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>API Keys</h1>
            <p>Manage API keys for programmatic access</p>
        </div>

        {{if .NewKey}}
        <div class="card" style="border-color: var(--success);">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Your New API Key</h2>
            </div>
            <p style="color: var(--danger); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.</p>
            <code style="display: block; padding: 1rem; background: var(--bg-primary); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 6px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; word-break: break-all;">{{.NewKey}}</code>
        </div>
        {{end}}

        <!-- Create API Key -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Create API Key</h2>
            </div>
            <form method="POST" action="/admin/api-keys">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                <label for="name">Key Name</label>
                <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="e.g. Production, Testing">
                <button type="submit" style="margin-top: 1rem;">Create Key</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        <!-- API Keys Table -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Your API Keys</h2>
            </div>
            {{if .APIKeys}}
            <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
                <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                    <thead>
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); text-align: left;">
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Name</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Key Prefix</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Created</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Last Used</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Status</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);"></th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {{range .APIKeys}}
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);">
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">{{.Name}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.KeyPrefix}}...</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.CreatedAt.Format "Jan 02, 2006"}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{if .LastUsedAt}}{{.LastUsedAt.Format "Jan 02, 2006"}}{{else}}Never{{end}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if .RevokedAt}}
                                <span class="status danger">Revoked</span>
                                {{else}}
                                <span class="status success">Active</span>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if not .RevokedAt}}
                                <form method="POST" action="/admin/api-keys/revoke" style="display: inline; margin: 0;" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This cannot be undone.');">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{$.CSRFToken}}">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="key_id" value="{{.ID}}">
                                    <button type="submit" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Revoke</button>
                                </form>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {{end}}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            {{else}}
            <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0;">No API keys yet. Create one to get started.</p>
            {{end}}
        </div>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/dashboard.html`
```html
{{define "dashboard.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Dashboard - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Dashboard</h1>
            <p>Welcome back, {{.Username}}</p>
        </div>

        {{if .StatsError}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.StatsError}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="stats-grid">
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="label">Jobs Today</div>
                <div class="value">{{if .JobsToday}}{{.JobsToday}}{{else}}0{{end}}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="label">Total Results</div>
                <div class="value">{{if .TotalResults}}{{.TotalResults}}{{else}}0{{end}}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="label">Security</div>
                {{if .TOTPEnabled}}
                <div class="value success">&#10003;</div>
                {{else}}
                <div class="value warning">&#10007;</div>
                {{end}}
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="label">Workers (Up/Total)</div>
                <div class="value">{{if .WorkersReachable}}{{.WorkersReachable}}{{else}}0{{end}} / {{if .WorkersTotal}}{{.WorkersTotal}}{{else}}0{{end}}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="label">Cluster Throughput</div>
                <div class="value">{{if .ClusterResultsPerMinute}}{{printf "%.1f" .ClusterResultsPerMinute}}{{else}}0{{end}} res/min</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Quick Actions</h2>
                {{if .TOTPEnabled}}
                <span class="status success">2FA Enabled</span>
                {{else}}
                <span class="status warning">2FA Disabled</span>
                {{end}}
            </div>
            <div class="actions-grid">
                <a href="/riverui/" class="btn-primary">Job Queue</a>
                <a href="/swagger/index.html" class="btn-secondary">API Docs</a>
                <a href="/admin/2fa/setup" class="btn-secondary">
                    {{if .TOTPEnabled}}Manage 2FA{{else}}Enable 2FA{{end}}
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/jobs.html`
```html
{{define "jobs.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Jobs - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Jobs</h1>
            <p>View and manage scrape jobs</p>
        </div>

        <!-- State Filter -->
        <div class="card" style="padding: 1rem 1.5rem;">
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;">
                <span style="font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-right: 0.5rem;">Filter:</span>
                <a href="/admin/jobs" style="padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem;{{if eq .CurrentState ""}} background: var(--primary); color: #fff;{{else}} background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary);{{end}}">All</a>
                <a href="/admin/jobs?state=available" style="padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem;{{if eq .CurrentState "available"}} background: var(--primary); color: #fff;{{else}} background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary);{{end}}">Pending</a>
                <a href="/admin/jobs?state=running" style="padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem;{{if eq .CurrentState "running"}} background: var(--primary); color: #fff;{{else}} background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary);{{end}}">Running</a>
                <a href="/admin/jobs?state=completed" style="padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem;{{if eq .CurrentState "completed"}} background: var(--primary); color: #fff;{{else}} background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary);{{end}}">Completed</a>
                <a href="/admin/jobs?state=discarded" style="padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem;{{if eq .CurrentState "discarded"}} background: var(--primary); color: #fff;{{else}} background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary);{{end}}">Failed</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Jobs Table -->
        <div class="card">
            {{if .Jobs}}
            <form method="POST" action="/admin/jobs/delete" style="margin: 0;">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{$.CSRFToken}}">
                {{if .CurrentState}}<input type="hidden" name="state" value="{{.CurrentState}}">{{end}}
                {{if .CurrentCursor}}<input type="hidden" name="cursor" value="{{.CurrentCursor}}">{{end}}
                <div style="padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;">
                    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer;">
                        <input id="select-all-jobs" type="checkbox">
                        Select all on page
                    </label>
                    <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Delete selected jobs on this page?');" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Delete Selected</button>
                    <button type="submit" formaction="/admin/jobs/delete-filtered" formmethod="POST" onclick="return confirm('Delete ALL jobs in the current filter across all pages?');" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Delete All Filtered</button>
                </div>
            <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
                <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                    <thead>
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); text-align: left;">
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; width: 36px;"></th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Keyword</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Status</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Results</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Created</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Started</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Completed</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {{range .Jobs}}
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);">
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                <input type="checkbox" class="job-checkbox" name="job_ids" value="{{.JobID}}">
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; max-width: 250px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;" title="{{.Keyword}}">{{.Keyword}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if eq .Status "completed"}}
                                <span class="status success">Completed</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "running"}}
                                <span class="status warning">Running</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "pending"}}
                                <span class="status warning">Pending</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "failed"}}
                                <span class="status danger">Failed</span>
                                {{if .Error}}<div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--danger); margin-top: 0.25rem; max-width: 250px; word-break: break-word;">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}
                                {{else}}
                                <span class="status">{{.Status}}</span>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.ResultCount}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.CreatedAt.Format "Jan 02, 2006 15:04"}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{if .StartedAt}}{{.StartedAt.Format "Jan 02, 2006 15:04"}}{{else}}&mdash;{{end}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{if .CompletedAt}}{{.CompletedAt.Format "Jan 02, 2006 15:04"}}{{else}}&mdash;{{end}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                <div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center;">
                                    {{if and (eq .Status "completed") (gt .ResultCount 0)}}
                                    <a href="/admin/jobs/{{.JobID}}/download" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--primary); color: var(--primary); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">Download</a>
                                    {{end}}
                                    <button type="submit" formaction="/admin/jobs/{{.JobID}}/delete" formmethod="POST" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this job?');" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Delete</button>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {{end}}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            </form>

            {{if .HasMore}}
            <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem 0;">
                <a href="{{.NextPageURL}}" style="padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--border-color);">Next Page &rarr;</a>
            </div>
            {{end}}

            {{else}}
            <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0;">No jobs found.</p>
            {{end}}
        </div>
    </main>
    <script>
    (() => {
        const selectAll = document.getElementById("select-all-jobs");
        if (!selectAll) return;
        const checkboxes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".job-checkbox"));
        selectAll.addEventListener("change", () => {
            for (const cb of checkboxes) {
                cb.checked = selectAll.checked;
            }
        });
        for (const cb of checkboxes) {
            cb.addEventListener("change", () => {
                selectAll.checked = checkboxes.length > 0 && checkboxes.every((c) => c.checked);
            });
        }
    })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/login.html`
```html
{{define "login.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Login - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body class="auth-layout">
    <div class="auth-card">
        <header>
            <h1>Maps Scraper</h1>
            <p>Sign in to continue</p>
        </header>

        {{if .Error}}
        <div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>
        {{end}}

        <form method="POST" action="/admin/login">
            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
            <label>
                Username
                <input type="text" name="username" required autocomplete="username" autofocus>
            </label>
            <label>
                Password
                <input type="password" name="password" required autocomplete="current-password">
            </label>
            <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
        </form>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/settings.html`
```html
{{define "settings.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Settings - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Settings</h1>
            <p>Manage your account settings</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Change Password -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Change Password</h2>
            </div>
            <form method="POST" action="/admin/settings/password">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">

                <label for="current_password">Current Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="current_password" name="current_password" required autocomplete="current-password">

                <label for="new_password">New Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="new_password" name="new_password" required minlength="8" autocomplete="new-password">
                <small>Must be at least 8 characters</small>

                <label for="confirm_password">Confirm New Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="confirm_password" name="confirm_password" required minlength="8" autocomplete="new-password">

                <button type="submit" style="margin-top: 1rem;">Update Password</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        <!-- Two-Factor Authentication -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Two-Factor Authentication</h2>
                {{if .TOTPEnabled}}
                <span class="status success">Enabled</span>
                {{else}}
                <span class="status warning">Disabled</span>
                {{end}}
            </div>

            {{if .TOTPEnabled}}
            <p>Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account. This adds an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app when logging in.</p>
            <div class="actions-grid" style="max-width: 300px;">
                <a href="/admin/2fa/setup" class="btn-secondary">Manage 2FA</a>
            </div>
            <details style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
                <summary>Disable Two-Factor Authentication</summary>
                <p style="margin: 1rem 0; color: var(--text-secondary);">
                    Disabling 2FA will make your account less secure. You will need to enter your password to confirm.
                </p>
                <form method="POST" action="/admin/2fa/disable">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                    <label for="disable_password">Enter your password to disable 2FA</label>
                    <input type="password" id="disable_password" name="password" required autocomplete="current-password">
                    <button type="submit" class="btn-danger" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">Disable 2FA</button>
                </form>
            </details>
            {{else}}
            <p>Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account. When enabled, you'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app in addition to your password when logging in.</p>
            <div class="actions-grid" style="max-width: 300px; margin-top: 1rem;">
                <a href="/admin/2fa/setup" class="btn-primary">Enable 2FA</a>
            </div>
            {{end}}
        </div>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/terminal.html`
```html
{{define "terminal.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Terminal - {{.WorkerName}}</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/admin/static/xterm.css">
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #000; }
        #terminal { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
        #status {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
            padding: 4px 12px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px;
            background: #1a1a2e; color: #888; z-index: 10;
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
        }
        #status.connected { color: #4caf50; }
        #status.error { color: #f44336; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="status">
        <span id="statusText">Connecting to {{.WorkerName}} ({{.WorkerIP}})...</span>
        <span id="statusRight"></span>
    </div>
    <div id="terminal" style="padding-top: 24px;"></div>

    <script src="/admin/static/xterm.min.js"></script>
    <script src="/admin/static/xterm-addon-fit.min.js"></script>
    <script>
    (function() {
        var workerID = {{.WorkerID}};
        var workerName = "{{.WorkerName}}";

        var term = new Terminal({
            cursorBlink: true,
            fontSize: 14,
            fontFamily: "'Fira Code', 'Cascadia Code', 'Source Code Pro', 'Menlo', monospace",
            theme: {
                background: '#0d1117',
                foreground: '#c9d1d9',
                cursor: '#58a6ff',
                selectionBackground: '#264f78'
            }
        });

        var fitAddon = new FitAddon.FitAddon();
        term.loadAddon(fitAddon);

        var termEl = document.getElementById('terminal');
        var statusEl = document.getElementById('status');
        var statusText = document.getElementById('statusText');

        term.open(termEl);
        fitAddon.fit();

        var protocol = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
        var wsURL = protocol + '//' + location.host + '/admin/workers/' + workerID + '/terminal/ws';
        var ws = new WebSocket(wsURL);
        ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

        function sendSize() {
            var size = JSON.stringify({high: term.rows, width: term.cols});
            var buf = new TextEncoder().encode(size);
            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                ws.send(buf.buffer);
            }
        }

        ws.onopen = function() {
            statusText.textContent = 'Connected to ' + workerName;
            statusEl.className = 'connected';
            sendSize();
        };

        ws.onmessage = function(ev) {
            if (typeof ev.data === 'string') {
                term.write(ev.data);
            } else {
                term.write(new Uint8Array(ev.data));
            }
        };

        ws.onclose = function() {
            statusText.textContent = 'Disconnected from ' + workerName;
            statusEl.className = 'error';
            term.write('\r\n\r\n--- Connection closed ---\r\n');
        };

        ws.onerror = function() {
            statusText.textContent = 'Connection error';
            statusEl.className = 'error';
        };

        term.onData(function(data) {
            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                ws.send(data);
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
            fitAddon.fit();
            sendSize();
        });
    })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `admin/templates/workers.html`
```html
{{define "workers.html"}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    {{template "head"}}
    <title>Workers - Maps Scraper</title>
</head>
<body>
    {{template "navbar" .}}

    <main class="container">
        {{if .Success}}<div class="alert alert-success">{{.Success}}</div>{{end}}
        {{if .Error}}<div class="alert alert-error">{{.Error}}</div>{{end}}

        <div class="page-header">
            <h1>Workers</h1>
            <p>Manage cloud worker instances on DigitalOcean or Hetzner Cloud</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Provider Setup -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Cloud Provider Tokens</h2>
            </div>
            <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 1rem;">Configure API tokens for the cloud providers you want to use for worker provisioning.</p>
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem;">
                <div>
                    <form method="POST" action="/admin/workers/settings">
                        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                        <input type="hidden" name="provider" value="digitalocean">
                        <label for="do_token">DigitalOcean Token {{if .DOConfigured}}<span class="status success" style="font-size: 0.75rem;">Active</span>{{end}}</label>
                        <input type="password" id="do_token" name="token" placeholder="dop_v1_...">
                        <button type="submit" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">{{if .DOConfigured}}Update{{else}}Save{{end}} Token</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <form method="POST" action="/admin/workers/settings">
                        <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">
                        <input type="hidden" name="provider" value="hetzner">
                        <label for="hetzner_token">Hetzner Cloud Token {{if .HetznerConfigured}}<span class="status success" style="font-size: 0.75rem;">Active</span>{{end}}</label>
                        <input type="password" id="hetzner_token" name="token" placeholder="API token...">
                        <button type="submit" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">{{if .HetznerConfigured}}Update{{else}}Save{{end}} Token</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        {{if .AnyConfigured}}
        <!-- Provision Worker -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Provision Worker</h2>
            </div>
            <form method="POST" action="/admin/workers" id="provisionForm">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{.CSRFToken}}">

                <label for="provider">Cloud Provider</label>
                <select id="provider" name="provider" required onchange="updateProviderOptions()">
                    <option value="">Select a provider...</option>
                    {{if .DOConfigured}}<option value="digitalocean">DigitalOcean</option>{{end}}
                    {{if .HetznerConfigured}}<option value="hetzner">Hetzner Cloud</option>{{end}}
                </select>

                <label for="name">Name</label>
                <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="e.g. worker-eu-1">

                <label for="region">Region</label>
                <select id="region" name="region" required onchange="updateSizeOptions()">
                    <option value="">Select a provider first...</option>
                </select>

                <label for="size">Size</label>
                <select id="size" name="size" required>
                    <option value="">Select a provider first...</option>
                </select>

                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem;">
                    <div>
                        <label for="concurrency">Worker Containers</label>
                        <input type="number" id="concurrency" name="concurrency" value="8" min="1" max="64">
                        <small style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Number of worker containers to run on this host</small>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label for="max_jobs_per_cycle">Max Jobs Per Cycle</label>
                        <input type="number" id="max_jobs_per_cycle" name="max_jobs_per_cycle" value="100" min="1">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="margin-top: 1rem;">
                    <label>
                        <input type="checkbox" name="fast_mode">
                        Fast Mode (stealth HTTP, requires geo_coordinates)
                    </label>
                </div>

                <label for="proxies" style="margin-top: 1rem;">Proxies (optional, comma-separated)</label>
                <input type="text" id="proxies" name="proxies" placeholder="http://user:pass@host:port, ...">

                <button type="submit" style="margin-top: 1rem;">Provision Worker</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        <script>
        var doRegions = [{{range .DORegions}}{slug:"{{.Slug}}",name:"{{.Name}}"},{{end}}];
        var doSizes = [{{range .DOSizes}}{slug:"{{.Slug}}",desc:"{{.Description}}",vcpus:{{.VCPUs}},mem:{{.Memory}},disk:{{.Disk}},price:{{printf "%.0f" .PriceMonthly}},regions:[]},{{end}}];
        var hetznerRegions = [{{range .HetznerRegions}}{slug:"{{.Slug}}",name:"{{.Name}}"},{{end}}];
        var hetznerSizes = [{{range .HetznerSizes}}{slug:"{{.Slug}}",desc:"{{.Description}}",vcpus:{{.VCPUs}},mem:{{.Memory}},disk:{{.Disk}},price:{{printf "%.0f" .PriceMonthly}},regions:[{{range .Regions}}"{{.}}",{{end}}]},{{end}}];

        function updateProviderOptions() {
            var provider = document.getElementById('provider').value;
            var regionSel = document.getElementById('region');
            var sizeSel = document.getElementById('size');
            var regions = provider === 'digitalocean' ? doRegions : provider === 'hetzner' ? hetznerRegions : [];

            regionSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select a region...</option>';
            regions.forEach(function(r) {
                regionSel.innerHTML += '<option value="'+r.slug+'">'+r.name+' ('+r.slug+')</option>';
            });

            sizeSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select a region first...</option>';
        }

        function updateSizeOptions() {
            var provider = document.getElementById('provider').value;
            var region = document.getElementById('region').value;
            var sizeSel = document.getElementById('size');
            var allSizes = provider === 'digitalocean' ? doSizes : provider === 'hetzner' ? hetznerSizes : [];

            var sizes = allSizes.filter(function(s) {
                return s.regions.length === 0 || s.regions.indexOf(region) !== -1;
            });

            sizeSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select a size...</option>';
            sizes.forEach(function(s) {
                sizeSel.innerHTML += '<option value="'+s.slug+'">'+s.desc+' &mdash; '+s.vcpus+' vCPUs, '+s.mem+'MB RAM, '+s.disk+'GB &mdash; $'+s.price+'/mo</option>';
            });
        }
        </script>
        {{end}}

        <!-- Workers Table -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>Your Workers</h2>
            </div>
            <div id="workers-table-wrapper" style="overflow-x: auto;{{if not .Workers}} display: none;{{end}}">
                <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem;">
                    <thead>
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); text-align: left;">
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Name</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Provider</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Region</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Size</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Status</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Health</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">Stats</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);">IP Address</th>
                            <th style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary);"></th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="workers-tbody">
                        {{range .Workers}}
                        <tr data-worker-id="{{.ID}}" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);">
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">{{.Name}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: capitalize;">{{.Provider}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.Region}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{.Size}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if eq .Status "active"}}
                                <span class="status success">Active</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "provisioning"}}
                                <span class="status warning">Provisioning</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "deleting"}}
                                <span class="status warning">Deleting</span>
                                {{else if eq .Status "failed"}}
                                <span class="status danger">Failed</span>
                                {{if .ErrorMessage}}<div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--danger); margin-top: 0.25rem; max-width: 200px; word-break: break-word;">{{.ErrorMessage}}</div>{{end}}
                                {{else}}
                                <span class="status">{{.Status}}</span>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if .Health}}
                                    {{if .Health.Reachable}}
                                    <span class="status success" title="Worker responding">OK</span>
                                    {{else}}
                                    <span class="status danger" title="Worker not responding">Down</span>
                                    {{end}}
                                {{else}}
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">&mdash;</span>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">
                                {{if and .Health .Health.Reachable}}
                                    {{if .Health.ResultsPerMinute}}Speed: {{printf "%.1f" .Health.ResultsPerMinute}} res/min<br>{{end}}
                                    {{if .Health.ResultsCollected}}Results: {{.Health.ResultsCollected}}<br>{{end}}
                                    {{if .Health.Uptime}}Up: {{.Health.Uptime}}<br>{{end}}
                                    {{if .Health.CheckedAt}}<span style="font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.7;">Checked: {{.Health.CheckedAt}}</span>{{end}}
                                {{else}}
                                &mdash;
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{if .IPAddress}}{{.IPAddress}}{{else}}&mdash;{{end}}</td>
                            <td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
                                {{if and (ne .Status "deleting") (ne .Status "deleted")}}
                                {{if and .IPAddress (eq .Status "active")}}
                                <button onclick="window.open('/admin/workers/{{.ID}}/terminal', '_blank', 'width=900,height=600')" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--primary); color: var(--primary); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto; margin-right: 0.5rem;">Terminal</button>
                                {{end}}
                                <form method="POST" action="/admin/workers/{{.ID}}/delete" style="display: inline; margin: 0;" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this worker? This will destroy the server.');">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{$.CSRFToken}}">
                                    <button type="submit" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Delete</button>
                                </form>
                                {{end}}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {{end}}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            <p id="no-workers-msg" style="color: var(--text-secondary); text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0;{{if .Workers}} display: none;{{end}}">No workers yet. Configure a provider and provision one to get started.</p>
        </div>

        <!-- SSH Key Pair -->
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h2>SSH Key Pair</h2>
                {{if .SSHKeyExists}}
                <span class="status success">Generated</span>
                {{else}}
                <span class="status warning">Not Generated</span>
                {{end}}
            </div>

            {{if .SSHKeyExists}}
            <p>The application SSH key pair is used to connect to provisioned workers. Download the private key to connect via SSH.</p>
            <div class="actions-grid" style="max-width: 500px; margin-top: 1rem;">
                <a href="/admin/workers/ssh-key/private" class="btn-primary" download>Download Private Key</a>
                <a href="/admin/workers/ssh-key/public" class="btn-secondary" download>Download Public Key</a>
            </div>
            <small style="display: block; margin-top: 0.5rem;">After downloading, set permissions: <code>chmod 600 gmapspro_id_ed25519</code></small>
            <small>Connect to a worker: <code>ssh -p 2222 -i gmapspro_id_ed25519 root@&lt;worker-ip&gt;</code></small>
            {{else}}
            <p>No SSH key pair has been generated yet. A key pair will be automatically generated when you provision your first worker.</p>
            {{end}}
        </div>
        <script>
        (function() {
            var csrfToken = '{{.CSRFToken}}';
            var tbody = document.getElementById('workers-tbody');
            var tableWrapper = document.getElementById('workers-table-wrapper');
            var noWorkersMsg = document.getElementById('no-workers-msg');

            function escapeHtml(s) {
                var div = document.createElement('div');
                div.appendChild(document.createTextNode(s));
                return div.innerHTML;
            }

            function renderStatus(w) {
                if (w.Status === 'active') return '<span class="status success">Active</span>';
                if (w.Status === 'provisioning') return '<span class="status warning">Provisioning</span>';
                if (w.Status === 'deleting') return '<span class="status warning">Deleting</span>';
                if (w.Status === 'failed') {
                    var html = '<span class="status danger">Failed</span>';
                    if (w.ErrorMessage) html += '<div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--danger); margin-top: 0.25rem; max-width: 200px; word-break: break-word;">'+escapeHtml(w.ErrorMessage)+'</div>';
                    return html;
                }
                return '<span class="status">'+escapeHtml(w.Status)+'</span>';
            }

            function renderHealth(w) {
                if (!w.Health) return '<span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">&mdash;</span>';
                if (w.Health.reachable) return '<span class="status success" title="Worker responding">OK</span>';
                return '<span class="status danger" title="Worker not responding">Down</span>';
            }

            function renderStats(w) {
                if (!w.Health || !w.Health.reachable) return '&mdash;';
                var parts = [];
                if (w.Health.results_per_minute) parts.push('Speed: '+w.Health.results_per_minute.toFixed(1)+' res/min');
                if (w.Health.results_collected) parts.push('Results: '+w.Health.results_collected);
                if (w.Health.uptime) parts.push('Up: '+escapeHtml(w.Health.uptime));
                return parts.join('<br>') || '&mdash;';
            }

            function renderActions(w) {
                if (w.Status === 'deleting' || w.Status === 'deleted') return '';
                var html = '';
                if (w.IPAddress && w.Status === 'active') {
                    html += '<button onclick="window.open(\'/admin/workers/'+w.ID+'/terminal\', \'_blank\', \'width=900,height=600\')" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--primary); color: var(--primary); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto; margin-right: 0.5rem;">Terminal</button>';
                }
                html += '<form method="POST" action="/admin/workers/'+w.ID+'/delete" style="display: inline; margin: 0;" onsubmit="return confirm(\'Are you sure you want to delete this worker? This will destroy the server.\');">';
                html += '<input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="'+csrfToken+'">';
                html += '<button type="submit" style="background: none; border: 1px solid var(--danger); color: var(--danger); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: auto;">Delete</button>';
                html += '</form>';
                return html;
            }

            function buildRow(w) {
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.setAttribute('data-worker-id', w.ID);
                tr.style.borderBottom = '1px solid var(--border-color)';
                tr.innerHTML =
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-weight: 500;">'+escapeHtml(w.Name)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: capitalize;">'+escapeHtml(w.Provider)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">'+escapeHtml(w.Region)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">'+escapeHtml(w.Size)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">'+renderStatus(w)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">'+renderHealth(w)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">'+renderStats(w)+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; color: var(--text-secondary);">'+(w.IPAddress ? escapeHtml(w.IPAddress) : '&mdash;')+'</td>'+
                    '<td style="padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;">'+renderActions(w)+'</td>';
                return tr;
            }

            function updateRow(tr, w) {
                var cells = tr.children;
                cells[4].innerHTML = renderStatus(w);
                cells[5].innerHTML = renderHealth(w);
                cells[6].innerHTML = renderStats(w);
                cells[7].innerHTML = w.IPAddress ? escapeHtml(w.IPAddress) : '&mdash;';
                cells[8].innerHTML = renderActions(w);
            }

            var es = new EventSource('/admin/workers/stream');
            es.onmessage = function(e) {
                var data = JSON.parse(e.data);
                var workers = data.workers || [];
                var idSet = {};

                for (var i = 0; i < workers.length; i++) {
                    var w = workers[i];
                    idSet[w.ID] = true;
                    var existing = tbody.querySelector('tr[data-worker-id="'+w.ID+'"]');
                    if (existing) {
                        updateRow(existing, w);
                    } else {
                        tbody.appendChild(buildRow(w));
                    }
                }

                var rows = tbody.querySelectorAll('tr[data-worker-id]');
                for (var j = 0; j < rows.length; j++) {
                    var rid = rows[j].getAttribute('data-worker-id');
                    if (!idSet[rid]) {
                        rows[j].remove();
                    }
                }

                if (workers.length > 0) {
                    tableWrapper.style.display = '';
                    noWorkersMsg.style.display = 'none';
                } else {
                    tableWrapper.style.display = 'none';
                    noWorkersMsg.style.display = '';
                }
            };
        })();
        </script>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}
```

## File: `api/api.go`
```go
package api

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
	"time"

	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5/middleware"

	"github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper/httpext"
	"github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper/log"
	"github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper/rqueue"
)

// IStore defines the interface for API storage operations.
type IStore interface {
	ValidateAPIKey(ctx context.Context, key string) (keyID int, keyName string, err error)
}

// AppState holds dependencies for API handlers.
type AppState struct {
	RQueue *rqueue.Client
	Store  IStore
}

// NewAppState creates a new API AppState.
func NewAppState(rqueue *rqueue.Client, store IStore) *AppState {
	return &AppState{
		RQueue: rqueue,
		Store:  store,
	}
}

// Routes sets up API routes on the given router.
func Routes(r chi.Router, appState *AppState) {
	r.Use(httpext.LoggingMiddleware)
	r.Use(middleware.Recoverer)
	r.Use(middleware.Timeout(120 * time.Second))
	r.Use(KeyAuth(appState.Store.ValidateAPIKey))

	r.Route("/api/v1", func(r chi.Router) {
		r.Get("/health", healthCheckHandler(appState))
		r.Post("/scrape", scrapeHandler(appState))
		r.Get("/jobs", listJobsHandler(appState))
		r.Get("/jobs/{job_id}", getJobHandler(appState))
		r.Delete("/jobs/{job_id}", deleteJobHandler(appState))
	})
}

// healthCheckHandler godoc
// @Summary Health check
// @Description Check if the API service is healthy
// @Tags health
// @Produce json
// @Success 200 {object} HealthCheckResponse
// @Router /api/v1/health [get]
func healthCheckHandler(_ *AppState) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {
		respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusOK, HealthCheckResponse{
			Status: "ok",
		})
	}
}

// scrapeHandler godoc
// @Summary Submit a scrape job
// @Description Submit a new Google Maps scrape job for processing
// @Tags scrape
// @Accept json
// @Produce json
// @Param request body ScrapeRequest true "Scrape request parameters"
// @Success 202 {object} ScrapeResponse
// @Failure 400 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Failure 500 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Router /api/v1/scrape [post]
func scrapeHandler(appState *AppState) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		// Limit request body to 1MB to prevent DoS
		r.Body = http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, 1<<20)

		var req ScrapeRequest
		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{
				Message: "invalid request body",
			})

			return
		}

		req.SetDefaults()

		if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{
				Message: err.Error(),
			})

			return
		}

		jobArgs := rqueue.ScrapeJobArgs{
			Keyword:        req.Keyword,
			Lang:           req.Lang,
			MaxDepth:       req.MaxDepth,
			Email:          req.Email,
			GeoCoordinates: req.GeoCoordinates,
			Zoom:           req.Zoom,
			Radius:         req.Radius,
			FastMode:       req.FastMode,
			ExtraReviews:   req.ExtraReviews,
			TimeoutSecs:    req.Timeout,
		}

		jobID, err := appState.RQueue.InsertJob(r.Context(), jobArgs)
		if err != nil {
			log.Error("failed to insert job", "error", err, "job_id", jobID)
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, ErrorResponse{
				Message: "failed to create job",
			})

			return
		}

		respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusAccepted, ScrapeResponse{
			JobID:  jobID,
			Status: "pending",
		})
	}
}

// listJobsHandler godoc
// @Summary List jobs
// @Description List all scrape jobs with pagination and optional state filtering
// @Tags scrape
// @Produce json
// @Param state query string false "Filter by state (available, running, completed, cancelled, discarded, pending, retryable, scheduled)"
// @Param limit query int false "Number of jobs to return (default: 20, max: 100)"
// @Param cursor query string false "Cursor for pagination"
// @Success 200 {object} ListJobsResponse
// @Failure 400 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Failure 500 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Router /api/v1/jobs [get]
func listJobsHandler(appState *AppState) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		state := r.URL.Query().Get("state")
		cursor := r.URL.Query().Get("cursor")

		limit := 20

		if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
			if n, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && n > 0 {
				limit = n
			}
		}

		if limit > 100 {
			limit = 100
		}

		result, err := appState.RQueue.ListJobs(r.Context(), state, limit, cursor)
		if err != nil {
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{
				Message: err.Error(),
			})

			return
		}

		jobs := make([]JobSummary, 0, len(result.Jobs))
		for _, job := range result.Jobs {
			jobs = append(jobs, JobSummary{
				JobID:       job.JobID,
				Status:      job.Status,
				Keyword:     job.Keyword,
				CreatedAt:   job.CreatedAt,
				StartedAt:   job.StartedAt,
				CompletedAt: job.CompletedAt,
				ResultCount: job.ResultCount,
				Error:       job.Error,
			})
		}

		respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusOK, ListJobsResponse{
			Jobs:       jobs,
			NextCursor: result.NextCursor,
			HasMore:    result.HasMore,
		})
	}
}

// getJobHandler godoc
// @Summary Get job status
// @Description Get the status and results of a scrape job
// @Tags scrape
// @Produce json
// @Param job_id path string true "Job ID"
// @Success 200 {object} JobStatusResponse
// @Failure 400 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Failure 404 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Router /api/v1/jobs/{job_id} [get]
func getJobHandler(appState *AppState) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		jobID := chi.URLParam(r, "job_id")
		if jobID == "" {
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{
				Message: "job_id is required",
			})

			return
		}

		jobStatus, err := appState.RQueue.GetJobStatus(r.Context(), jobID)
		if err != nil {
			log.Error("failed to get job status", "error", err, "job_id", jobID)
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, ErrorResponse{
				Message: "job not found",
			})

			return
		}

		var results any
		if jobStatus.Results != nil {
			_ = json.Unmarshal(jobStatus.Results, &results)
		}

		response := JobStatusResponse{
			JobID:       jobStatus.JobID,
			Status:      jobStatus.Status,
			Keyword:     jobStatus.Keyword,
			CreatedAt:   jobStatus.CreatedAt,
			StartedAt:   jobStatus.StartedAt,
			CompletedAt: jobStatus.CompletedAt,
			Results:     results,
			Error:       jobStatus.Error,
			ResultCount: jobStatus.ResultCount,
		}

		respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)
	}
}

// deleteJobHandler godoc
// @Summary Delete a job
// @Description Queues deletion of a job and its results. Running jobs are cancelled first.
// @Tags scrape
// @Param job_id path string true "Job ID"
// @Success 202 {object} DeleteJobResponse
// @Failure 400 {object} ErrorResponse "Invalid job ID"
// @Failure 404 {object} ErrorResponse "Job not found"
// @Failure 500 {object} ErrorResponse "Internal server error"
// @Router /api/v1/jobs/{job_id} [delete]
func deleteJobHandler(appState *AppState) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		jobID := chi.URLParam(r, "job_id")
		if jobID == "" {
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{
				Message: "job_id is required",
			})

			return
		}

		err := appState.RQueue.DeleteJob(r.Context(), jobID)
		if err != nil {
			if containsNotFound(err) {
				respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusNotFound, ErrorResponse{
					Message: "job not found",
				})

				return
			}

			log.Error("failed to delete job", "error", err, "job_id", jobID)
			respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, ErrorResponse{
				Message: err.Error(),
			})

			return
		}

		respondWithJSON(w, http.StatusAccepted, DeleteJobResponse{
			Message: "deletion queued",
		})
	}
}

// containsNotFound checks if the error message contains "not found".
func containsNotFound(err error) bool {
	if err == nil {
		return false
	}

	return strings.Contains(err.Error(), "not found")
}

func respondWithJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, payload any) {
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(status)

	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(payload)
}
```

## File: `api/middleware.go`
```go
package api

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type contextKey string

const apiKeyContextKey contextKey = "api_key"

// KeyInfo represents minimal API key information stored in context.
type KeyInfo struct {
	ID   int
	Name string
}

// ValidateKeyFunc is a function that validates an API key and returns key info.
type ValidateKeyFunc func(ctx context.Context, key string) (keyID int, keyName string, err error)

// KeyAuth middleware validates API keys from Authorization or X-API-Key headers.
func KeyAuth(validateKey ValidateKeyFunc) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
			// Check Authorization header
			authHeader := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
			if authHeader == "" {
				// Also check X-API-Key header
				authHeader = r.Header.Get("X-API-Key")
			}

			if authHeader == "" {
				http.Error(w, `{"error": "missing api key"}`, http.StatusUnauthorized)
				return
			}

			// Extract the key from "Bearer <key>" or just "<key>"
			key := strings.TrimPrefix(authHeader, "Bearer ")

			keyID, keyName, err := validateKey(r.Context(), key)
			if err != nil {
				http.Error(w, `{"error": "invalid api key"}`, http.StatusUnauthorized)
				return
			}

			apiKeyInfo := &KeyInfo{ID: keyID, Name: keyName}
			ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), apiKeyContextKey, apiKeyInfo)
			next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
		})
	}
}

// KeyFromContext retrieves the API key info from context.
func KeyFromContext(ctx context.Context) *KeyInfo {
	if key, ok := ctx.Value(apiKeyContextKey).(*KeyInfo); ok {
		return key
	}

	return nil
}
```

## File: `api/responses.go`
```go
package api

import (
	"fmt"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
	"time"
)

// GmapData represents Google Maps scrape results data.
type GmapData any

// ErrorResponse represents an error response
// @Description Error response returned when a request fails
type ErrorResponse struct {
	Message string `json:"message" example:"invalid request body"`
}

// HealthCheckResponse represents a health check response
// @Description Health check response indicating service status
type HealthCheckResponse struct {
	Status string `json:"status" example:"ok"`
}

// ScrapeRequest represents a request to scrape Google Maps
// @Description Request body for submitting a scrape job
type ScrapeRequest struct {
	// Search keyword (e.g., "restaurants in New York")
	Keyword string `json:"keyword" example:"restaurants in New York"`
	// Language code for results (default: "en")
	Lang string `json:"lang,omitempty" example:"en"`
	// Maximum depth for pagination (default: 1, max: 100)
	MaxDepth int `json:"max_depth,omitempty" example:"1"`
	// Whether to extract email addresses from websites
	Email bool `json:"email,omitempty" example:"false"`
	// Geographic coordinates in "lat,lon" format
	GeoCoordinates string `json:"geo_coordinates,omitempty" example:"40.7128,-74.0060"`
	// Zoom level for map search (1-21)
	Zoom int `json:"zoom,omitempty" example:"14"`
	// Search radius in kilometers
	Radius float64 `json:"radius,omitempty" example:"5.0"`
	// Use fast mode (stealth HTTP instead of browser)
	FastMode bool `json:"fast_mode,omitempty" example:"false"`
	// Extract additional reviews
	ExtraReviews bool `json:"extra_reviews,omitempty" example:"false"`
	// Job timeout in seconds (1-300, default: 300)
	Timeout int `json:"timeout,omitempty" example:"300"`
}

func (r *ScrapeRequest) Validate() error {
	if r.Keyword == "" {
		return fmt.Errorf("keyword is required")
	}

	if r.GeoCoordinates != "" {
		if strings.Count(r.GeoCoordinates, ",") != 1 {
			return fmt.Errorf("geo_coordinates must contain exactly one comma")
		}

		latStr, lonStr, ok := strings.Cut(r.GeoCoordinates, ",")
		if !ok {
			return fmt.Errorf("geo_coordinates must be in format 'lat,lon'")
		}

		lat, err := strconv.ParseFloat(strings.TrimSpace(latStr), 64)
		if err != nil {
			return fmt.Errorf("invalid latitude: %w", err)
		}

		lon, err := strconv.ParseFloat(strings.TrimSpace(lonStr), 64)
		if err != nil {
			return fmt.Errorf("invalid longitude: %w", err)
		}

		if lat < -90 || lat > 90 {
			return fmt.Errorf("latitude must be between -90 and 90")
		}

		if lon < -180 || lon > 180 {
			return fmt.Errorf("longitude must be between -180 and 180")
		}
	}

	if r.FastMode {
		if r.GeoCoordinates == "" {
			return fmt.Errorf("geo_coordinates are required in fast mode")
		}

		if r.Zoom == 0 {
			return fmt.Errorf("zoom is required in fast mode")
		}
	}

	if r.Zoom != 0 && (r.Zoom < 1 || r.Zoom > 21) {
		return fmt.Errorf("zoom must be between 1 and 21")
	}

	if r.Radius < 0 {
		return fmt.Errorf("radius must be non-negative")
	}

	if r.MaxDepth < 0 || r.MaxDepth > 100 {
		return fmt.Errorf("max_depth must be between 0 and 100")
	}

	if r.Timeout < 1 || r.Timeout > 300 {
		return fmt.Errorf("timeout must be between 1 and 300 seconds")
	}

	return nil
}

func (r *ScrapeRequest) SetDefaults() {
	if r.Lang == "" {
		r.Lang = "en"
	}

	if r.MaxDepth == 0 {
		r.MaxDepth = 1
	}

	if r.Timeout == 0 {
		r.Timeout = 300 // 5 minutes default
	}
}

// ScrapeResponse represents the response after submitting a scrape job
// @Description Response returned after successfully submitting a scrape job
type ScrapeResponse struct {
	// Unique job identifier
	JobID string `json:"job_id" example:"kYzR8xLmNpQvWjX3"`
	// Current job status
	Status string `json:"status" example:"pending"`
}

// ListJobsRequest represents parameters for listing jobs
// @Description Query parameters for listing jobs with pagination and filtering
type ListJobsRequest struct {
	// Filter by job state (available, running, completed, cancelled, discarded, pending, retryable, scheduled)
	State string `json:"state,omitempty" example:"completed"`
	// Number of jobs to return (default: 20, max: 100)
	Limit int `json:"limit,omitempty" example:"20"`
	// Cursor for pagination (from previous response)
	Cursor string `json:"cursor,omitempty" example:""`
}

// JobSummary represents a job without result data
// @Description Summary of a job without the full result data
type JobSummary struct {
	// Unique job identifier (encoded)
	JobID string `json:"job_id" example:"kYzR8xLmNpQvWjX3"`
	// Current job status
	Status string `json:"status" example:"completed"`
	// Search keyword used for this job
	Keyword string `json:"keyword" example:"restaurants in New York"`
	// When the job was created
	CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at" example:"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"`
	// When the job started processing
	StartedAt *time.Time `json:"started_at,omitempty" example:"2024-01-15T10:30:05Z"`
	// When the job completed
	CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty" example:"2024-01-15T10:35:00Z"`
	// Number of results found
	ResultCount int `json:"result_count" example:"25"`
	// Error message if job failed
	Error string `json:"error,omitempty" example:""`
}

// ListJobsResponse represents a paginated list of jobs
// @Description Paginated list of jobs with cursor for next page
type ListJobsResponse struct {
	// List of jobs
	Jobs []JobSummary `json:"jobs"`
	// Cursor for next page (empty if no more results)
	NextCursor string `json:"next_cursor,omitempty" example:"eyJpZCI6MTIzfQ=="`
	// Whether there are more results
	HasMore bool `json:"has_more" example:"true"`
}

// JobStatusResponse represents the status of a scrape job
// @Description Detailed status of a scrape job including results when completed
type JobStatusResponse struct {
	// Unique job identifier
	JobID string `json:"job_id" example:"kYzR8xLmNpQvWjX3"`
	// Current job status (pending, running, completed, failed)
	Status string `json:"status" example:"completed"`
	// Search keyword used for this job
	Keyword string `json:"keyword" example:"restaurants in New York"`
	// When the job was created
	CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at" example:"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"`
	// When the job started processing
	StartedAt *time.Time `json:"started_at,omitempty" example:"2024-01-15T10:30:05Z"`
	// When the job completed
	CompletedAt *time.Time `json:"completed_at,omitempty" example:"2024-01-15T10:35:00Z"`
	// Scrape results (array of place data)
	Results GmapData `json:"results,omitempty"`
	// Error message if job failed
	Error string `json:"error,omitempty" example:""`
	// Number of results found
	ResultCount int `json:"result_count" example:"25"`
}

// DeleteJobResponse represents the response after requesting job deletion
// @Description Response returned after successfully queueing a job for deletion
type DeleteJobResponse struct {
	// Status message
	Message string `json:"message" example:"deletion queued"`
}
```

```go
	Version:          "1.0",
	Host:             "localhost:8080",
	BasePath:         "/",
	Schemes:          []string{"http", "https"},

	Description:      "API for scraping Google Maps data asynchronously",

	LeftDelim:        "{{",
	RightDelim:       "}}",
}

	swag.Register(SwaggerInfo.InstanceName(), SwaggerInfo)
}
```

```yaml
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
        "500":
          description: Internal Server Error
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
      summary: List jobs
      tags:
      - scrape
  /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}:

      parameters:
      - description: Job ID
        in: path
        name: job_id
        required: true
        type: string
      responses:
        "202":

        "400":
          description: Invalid job ID
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
        "404":
          description: Job not found

            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
        "500":
          description: Internal server error
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
      summary: Delete a job
      tags:
      - scrape
    get:
      description: Get the status and results of a scrape job
      parameters:
      - description: Job ID
        in: path
        name: job_id
        required: true
        type: string
      produces:
      - application/json
      responses:
        "200":
          description: OK
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.JobStatusResponse'
        "400":
          description: Bad Request
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
        "404":
          description: Not Found
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
      summary: Get job status
      tags:
      - scrape
  /api/v1/scrape:

        "500":
          description: Internal Server Error
          schema:
            $ref: '#/definitions/api.ErrorResponse'
      summary: Submit a scrape job
      tags:
      - scrape

- https
```
